description_long: This house features a steep gable roof with a prominent triangular facade, flanked by large windows and a central entryway. The exterior is primarily dark with white trim, and the property includes a detached garage, a driveway with parked cars, and a backyard with a swimming pool. Mature trees and landscaping surround the house, providing privacy and shade. The backyard also features a patio area with outdoor furniture and an umbrella, suggesting a space for relaxation and gatherings. The windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, and the overall design blends modern and traditional elements. The house sits adjacent to a paved street, with a clear front yard and defined property boundaries.
description: A modern gable-roofed house with dark siding, white trim, large windows, a detached garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, driveway, garage, and street access.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and garden, with the house's back facade and landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and more of the side yard and street.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, prominent door, and minimal overhang, flanked by large windows.
